productDisplayName: Fila Men Lobato Brown Casual Shoes
description: shoes from fila are made with fine fabrics crafted in Italy's materials capital, Biella. This Basic Low shoe from fila is an example of the brand's excellent craftsmanship. The low-top style and the canvas upper showcase the Italian brand's versatile power in innovation. Wear these with corduroy trousers and a polo t-shirt, or with your favourite jeans and a black tee. UpperLeather upper with stitch detailingLacing system for a snug, customised FitTextile inner lining for the collar and tongue to offer optimum fit and comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protectionMidsoleEVA midsole for impact protectionOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with brand logo styled lugs and ergonomic grooves for absolute grip and tractionPivot point at the big toe mound with brand logo for easy 180 degree movement of the footShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditionerDo not store in direct sunlight
